title: IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
company: IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
